hero.name: Akash Patel
hero.tagline: I build production-grade RAG systems, computer vision pipelines, and AI agents — turning complex ML research into working software that ships.

services.title: What I Build
services.subtitle: Specialized in the intersection of AI research and production engineering.

rag.title: RAG Systems
rag.desc: Custom retrieval-augmented generation pipelines — semantic search, vector databases, context compression, and multi-modal retrieval over your proprietary data.

vision.title: Computer Vision
vision.desc: End-to-end CV pipelines from data collection to deployed inference — object detection, image classification, OCR, and real-time video processing.

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.desc: Autonomous agent systems that reason, plan, and use tools — from single-agent workflows to multi-agent orchestration with reliable human-in-the-loop checkpoints.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Development
fullstack.desc: Complex CRUD systems, real-time dashboards, and API platforms — 6+ years building scalable backends and polished frontends that handle serious production load.

work.title: Selected Work
work.subtitle: Real projects — some anonymized due to NDA. More case studies being published.

playground.title: AI Playground
playground.subtitle: Try a live RAG demo — bring your own OpenAI key. Your key stays in your browser and is never sent to any server.
playground.key_note: Stored only in memory. Never sent to our servers.
playground.enter_key: Enter your OpenAI API key above to start chatting.
playground.error_no_key: Please enter your OpenAI API key to continue.
playground.disclaimer: This demo uses the OpenAI API directly from your browser. Your API key is never logged or transmitted anywhere except OpenAI's servers.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: 6+ years turning AI research into production software.
about.bio: I'm Akash — an AI/ML engineer and full-stack developer based in Ahmedabad, India. I specialize in taking bleeding-edge ML research and shipping it as reliable, scalable production systems. From RAG pipelines serving thousands of queries a day to real-time computer vision on embedded hardware, I've built across the full spectrum of AI applications. I work with startups, agencies, and mid-size teams worldwide — primarily remote, always async-friendly.

social.title: Follow My Journey
social.subtitle: I share AI/ML tutorials, dev walkthroughs, and project breakdowns.
social.youtube_desc: AI/ML tutorials, project builds, code walkthroughs
social.instagram_desc: Dev updates, ML experiments, behind the scenes

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Available for freelance projects, consulting, and long-term collaborations. Based in India, working globally.
